text: The thing is, it might be called parody of the true Deadpool. However, this deadpool is another authentic version of the villain deadpool we knew. Remember, from the previous movie XMEN: Days of the Future Past? This movie comes up with that idea. 20th Century Fox really hit that road. After Wolverine changed the past, where mystiques DNA has been experimented to create the ultimate machine like Deadpool that is able to copy all abilities of mutants, Wolverine stopped it. And at the end, the future has been changed, as well as Deadpool's Fate. But, is it possible, the evil Deadpool aka. Dreadpool fight the Hero Deadpool, well, who knows? On Marvel Comics, Deadpool really fight his evil version, where he able to defeat it. BTW, remember the girl who has ability to time travel to alternate timeline, maybe that will hit the road.
